# Squiretown Consulting, LLC

> Squiretown Consulting is a multi-service business consulting firm based in Hampton Bays, New York, serving clients nationwide and internationally. We help businesses with brand and marketing strategy, AI technology implementation, business funding advisory, and real estate title services.

Squiretown Consulting, LLC was established in 2022 and operates from 15 W Montauk Hwy, Ste 112, Hampton Bays, NY 11946. We work with clients across all U.S. states and internationally through remote collaboration. All inquiries are handled through our contact form at https://squiretown.co/contact.

## Services

- [Brand Awareness & Marketing](https://squiretown.co/brand-marketing): Strategic brand development, visual identity, and integrated marketing campaigns for businesses looking to differentiate in their market.
- [AI Technology Stack](https://squiretown.co/ai-technology): AI implementation consulting, automation strategy, and technology stack design for businesses adopting AI tools and workflows.
- [Business Funding](https://squiretown.co/business-funding): Funding advisory, capital strategy, and connection to funding sources for businesses seeking growth capital.

## About

- [About Squiretown Consulting](https://squiretown.co/about): Our team, approach, and values.
- [Contact Us](https://squiretown.co/contact): Webform-based inquiry submission for all consulting engagements.

## Legal & Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://squiretown.co/privacy): How we handle your information.
- [Terms of Service](https://squiretown.co/terms): Terms governing use of our website and services.
- [SMS Messaging Terms](https://squiretown.co/sms-terms): Full terms for our SMS messaging program, including opt-in process, message types, frequency, and STOP/HELP instructions.
